jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Jetking
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
